---
title: "Resume"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-section resume-page">

  <div class="resume-header-bar">
    <div>
      <h2 class="resume-name">Mo Boroumand</h2>
      <p class="resume-contact">
        <span><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> mohamad.boroumand@gmail.com</span>
        <span><i class="bi bi-github"></i> github.com/moboroumand</span>
        <span><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> linkedin.com/in/moboroumand</span>
      </p>
    </div>
    <a href="assets/resume.pdf" class="btn btn-primary" download>
      <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- ============================================================
       SUMMARY
       ============================================================ -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h3 class="resume-section-title"><span>Summary</span></h3>
    <p>[Write a 2–3 sentence professional summary here.]</p>
  </div>

  <!-- ============================================================
       SKILLS
       ============================================================ -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h3 class="resume-section-title"><span>Skills</span></h3>
    <div class="skills-grid">
      <div class="skill-group">
        <strong>Technical</strong>
        <p>[e.g. Python, SQL, React, etc.]</p>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-group">
        <strong>Tools & Platforms</strong>
        <p>[e.g. AWS, Docker, Notion, etc.]</p>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-group">
        <strong>Soft Skills</strong>
        <p>[e.g. Leadership, Communication, etc.]</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ============================================================
       EDUCATION
       ============================================================ -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h3 class="resume-section-title"><span>Education</span></h3>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="entry-header">
        <div>
          <strong>[Degree Name]</strong> — [University Name]
        </div>
        <span class="entry-date">[Start Year] – [End Year]</span>
      </div>
      <p>[Optional: GPA, honours, relevant coursework, thesis.]</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Duplicate block above for additional degrees -->

  </div>

  <!-- ============================================================
       WORK EXPERIENCE (brief; full detail on /experience page)
       ============================================================ -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h3 class="resume-section-title"><span>Work Experience</span></h3>

    <div class="resume-entry">
      <div class="entry-header">
        <div>
          <strong>[Job Title]</strong> · <em>[Company Name]</em>
        </div>
        <span class="entry-date">[Start] – [End]</span>
      </div>
      <ul>
        <li>[Achievement / responsibility 1]</li>
        <li>[Achievement / responsibility 2]</li>
        <li>[Achievement / responsibility 3]</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <!-- Duplicate block above for each role -->

  </div>

  <!-- ============================================================
       CERTIFICATIONS / AWARDS (optional)
       ============================================================ -->
  <div class="resume-section">
    <h3 class="resume-section-title"><span>Certifications & Awards</span></h3>
    <ul>
      <li>[Certification / Award 1] — [Issuer, Year]</li>
      <li>[Certification / Award 2] — [Issuer, Year]</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>
```
